subject: (no subject)
body:
re dohm.....at least two if not three seperate
leases,, parking, dock, taxi... we must be careful of
liability.. at the end of twenty years, she's already
been paid,, for her business, as long as we make
payments ,, no mimimum , taxi business, she should get
dredge, mangrove, parking lot building, and lights and
dock upgrade permits.ADvance her money 30 k to do this.
